name: YouBot
description: You.com's crawler that indexes pages for its AI-powered search product. You.com documents a dedicated IP range, a reverse-DNS pattern, and support for signed-request verification via Web Bot Auth.

instances: Mozilla/5.0 AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko; compatible; YouBot/1.0; +https://docs.you.com/youbot; env:prod) Chrome/W.X.Y.Z Safari/537.36
